'''''Re''''' was a [[MC40a light cruiser/Legends|MC40a light cruiser]] belonging to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].

==History==
''Re'' along with [[Ta (MC40a light cruiser)|''Ta'']] were to go against the [[Strike-class medium cruiser|Strike Cruisers]] [[Eel (Strike-class)|''Eel'']] and ''[[Asp]]''. Both ships had [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]] from [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] and [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wings]] from [[Green Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Green Squadron]].

==Behind the scenes==
The outcome depends on which side the player takes.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
